title: symphyotrichum novi-belgii
intro: Symphyotrichum novi-belgii, also known as New York aster, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. Consuming Symphyotrichum novi-belgii has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address specific health concerns.
